properties.verseOrder: V1 V2 V3 V4 V5 V6

verse.name: V1
verse.lines: /: My hope is built on nothing less Than Jesus' blood and righteousness I dare not trust the sweetest frame But wholly trust in Jesus' name. :/

verse.name: V2
verse.lines: Christ alone; cornerstone, Weak made strong in the Saviour's love Through the storm, He is Lord, Lord of all,

verse.name: V3
verse.lines: When Darkness seems to hide His face I rest on His unchanging grace In every high and stormy gale My anchor holds within the veil, My anchor holds within the veil.

verse.name: V4
verse.lines: Christ alone; cornerstone, Weak made strong in the Saviour's love, Through the storm, He is Lord, Lord of all, He is Lord, Lord of all.

verse.name: V5
verse.lines: /: Christ alone; cornerstone Weak made strong in the Saviour's love Through the storm, He is Lord Lord of all. :/

verse.name: V6
verse.lines: When He shall come with trumpet sound, Oh, may I then in Him be found; Dressed in His righteousness alone, Faultless stand before the throne.
